name: Wizard
summary: Studied arcane caster. Prepares spells from a personal spellbook; specializes in one of the eight schools (or remains a universalist).

class_features.name: Arcane School
class_features.summary: Pick one school of magic for specialization (or remain a Universalist). Specialists pick two schools as their opposed schools and cannot cast from those without using two slots. Specialists gain bonus 1st-level spell slot of their school per level.

class_features.name: Arcane Bond
class_features.summary: At 1st level: choose either a familiar or a bonded object (amulet, ring, staff, wand, weapon).

class_features.name: Scribe Scroll
class_features.summary: Bonus feat: may scribe scrolls following standard item creation rules.

class_features.name: Cantrips
class_features.summary: Prepares 0-level wizard spells from spellbook; they are not expended when cast.
